texto: Battered women who were physically abused as children develop an active coping style as adults, typically with obsessive-compulsive tendencies. It is as if she can "just get things right" then the battering will stop. Those who were sexually abused as children tend to be severely depressed and a more passive coping style.
autor: Debra Crown LPC-S Journal of Family Violence 2006
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Debra Crown LPC-S Journal of Family Violence 2006: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a familia. O trecho “Battered women who were physically abused as children develop an active coping style as adults, t…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, battering, depression pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e depression.
